Cao Zuan śõĻÁļā
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Zuan (śõĻÁļā). Concerned that Cao Zhao and Cao Yu had lost their moment when they were away from the emperor. Cao Zuan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
